Title: How GitHub secret scanning saves your code
Description:
Accidentally pushing an API key or token to your repository can be terrifying. Luckily, GitHub secret scanning automatically checks your commits and alerts you if sensitive information is found. It shows you the exact file and line number so you can revoke the key before anyone exploits it.

Learn more about securing your code in GitHub for Beginners season 3: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zhxXaFzzJYA
